meta.project: DailyFitness — PRD v6 (Self-Contained Coach CRUD Tests)

product_overview: Coach-facing web app for creating workout templates, building multi-week programs, and assigning training to clients. This PRD focuses on self-contained coach CRUD flows where every test logs in fresh at '/', never uses /login, and creates its own data.
core_goals: Verify coach login from root '/' with Sign In / Sign Up tabs and redirect to /coach
Create a workout template containing all supported block types with Volume Calculator ON
Edit templates and confirm key field values (like reps) persist after save and reopen
Create a 4-week program, configure weekly schedules with templates, and verify persistence
Assign workouts (and, if available, programs) to clients from coach-facing UIs

features.name: Authentication & Login
features.description: Coach users authenticate via the root page '/'. Tests must begin at '/', and /login must never be used.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Sign In and Sign Up tabs -> Click Sign In tab if not already active -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Sign In button -> See redirect to /coach
Ensure /login is never used; any attempt to hit /login should be treated as a redirect path only, not a primary login route

features.name: Flow 1: Create Workout Template with All Block Types
features.description: Create a workout template 'TS Full Blocks Test' with one block of each supported type, Volume Calculator ON, and two sets per block with fields filled.
user_flows: Login at / as coach -> Open side menu -> Training -> Workout Templates -> Click Create New / +
Fill template name 'TS Full Blocks Test' and description 'All block types' -> Turn Volume Calculator ON -> Select optional category and difficulty if available
Add Straight Set block: choose any exercise, 2 sets, reps 10, weight 60, rest 90 if available
Add Superset block: 2 exercises, 2 sets, reps 12, weight 40, rest 60 if available
Add Giant Set block: 3 exercises, 2 sets, reps 15, weight 30
Add Drop Set, Cluster Set, Rest-Pause, Pre-Exhaustion with field values as specified in the PRD
Add Time-Based blocks via Time-Based -> AMRAP, EMOM, For Time, Tabata with appropriate time/interval fields where present
Add HR Sets block with any heart rate zone if field exists
Save template and verify success + detail page shows 'TS Full Blocks Test'; if certain block types are not present in the UI, skip and note as missing

features.name: Flow 2: Edit Existing Template — Change Values and Verify Persistence
features.description: Open an existing template, change reps on a block to 99, save, and confirm the change persists after reopening.
user_flows: Login at / as coach -> Open side menu -> Training -> Workout Templates
Open any existing template (first in list is fine) -> Click Edit Template
Verify template name field is non-empty -> Find any reps input on any block -> Note current reps value
Change reps to 99 -> Click Update / Save Template
After success, reopen Edit Template for the same template -> Verify the same reps field now shows 99

features.name: Flow 3: Create 4-Week Program with Weekly Schedule
features.description: Create 'TS 4-Week Program', configure 4-week duration, assign templates to specific days in Week 1 and Week 2, and set basic progression rules if available.
user_flows: Login at / as coach -> Click Training in bottom nav -> Click Create New / + program
On Basic Info tab: set name 'TS 4-Week Program', description 'Schedule and progression test', duration 4 weeks, optional goal/difficulty
On Schedule tab: for Week 1, assign templates to Monday, Wednesday, and Friday; leave other days as Rest Day
If week selector exists, switch to Week 2 and assign templates to Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday; leave other days as Rest Day; if week selector is missing, record as limitation
On Progression Rules tab (if present), set weight progression and/or reps progression as described; if the tab is empty or missing, record as limitation
Save program and verify detail page shows 'TS 4-Week Program'

features.name: Flow 4: Edit Program — Verify Schedule Persisted and Modify
features.description: Open an existing program, verify schedule data is present, change a day, save, and verify the change persists.
user_flows: Login at / as coach -> Training bottom nav -> Open any existing program -> Click Edit Program
On Schedule tab, verify at least one day has a template (not all Rest Day)
Change one assigned day to Rest Day or a different template -> Save
Reopen the same program edit screen and confirm the changed day reflects the new value

features.name: Flow 5: Assign Workout to Client
features.description: From the coach client hub, assign a workout template to a client and verify assignment.
user_flows: Login at / as coach -> Click Clients in bottom nav -> Open any client hub
Click Assign Workout -> Choose any available template -> Optionally set date -> Confirm assignment
Verify a success message and presence of the assigned workout in upcoming / assignments area

features.name: Flow 6: Locate Program Assignment Feature
features.description: Try to find and exercise the program assignment feature either from program detail or client hub; if not found, record as missing.
user_flows: Login at / as coach -> Training bottom nav -> Open a program detail page
Look for Assign or Assign Program controls on tabs (including any Clients tab) and attempt to assign to a client; verify success if present
If not found, go to Clients bottom nav -> open client hub -> search all tabs for Assign Program controls
If still not found, record that program assignment feature could not be located

routes.description: Login page with Sign In and Sign Up tabs. Unauthenticated users see the login form here. After successful login, redirects to /coach or /client based on role. There is NO /login route — all authentication starts at /.
Client training launcher for starting workouts
Start and run a specific workout session
Review and complete a finished workout
Client check-in and wellness submission page
Public user creation and onboarding page

features.name: Coach Workout Template Authoring
features.description: Coaches can create, edit, and manage workout templates that include multiple block types and manual fields.
user_interactions: Open workout templates library from coach Training section
Create a new template with name, description, and optional metadata
Add blocks such as Straight Set, Superset, Giant Set, Drop Set, Cluster Set, Rest-Pause, Pre-Exhaustion, and Time-based blocks
Save a template and reopen it in edit mode

features.name: Coach Multi-week Program Builder
features.description: Coaches can create multi-week training programs and configure weekly schedules using workout templates.
user_interactions: Create a new multi-week program with basic info
Configure weekly schedules with templates assigned to specific days
Edit an existing program and adjust weekly schedule

features.name: Coach Client Management and Assignments
features.description: Coaches can manage clients and assign workouts or programs to them.
user_interactions: (Where available) assign workouts or programs to a client
